title: salix multiformis var. undulata
intro: Salix multiformis var. undulata, also known as Willow Leaf or Willowleaf Willow, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that is native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, due to the presence of salicin, a compound similar to aspirin. The health benefits of Salix multiformis var. undulata include reducing pain and inflammation, relieving fever, and treating skin conditions such as acne and eczema. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, salves, and tinctures, which are often used to soothe sore muscles and joints, and to promote wound healing.
